title: Herb Crusted Red Snapper with Knot Breadcrumbs
description: A flavorful and crispy vegetarian dish featuring red snapper crusted with herbs and breadcrumbs, served with a side of your choice.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Rinse the red snapper fillet and pat dry with paper towels.
In a shallow dish, mix together flour, parsley, garlic powder, lemon zest, salt, and pepper.
Dip the red snapper fillet in the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated red snapper fillet on the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle olive oil over the red snapper fillet.
Sprinkle the crumbled knot breadcrumbs over the red snapper fillet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the breadcrumbs are golden brown.
